root_cause: The agent failed to handle tool errors properly when get_order_details calls failed, leading to unnecessary escalation instead of troubleshooting or attempting the required actions with correct order ID format.
explanation: The agent made multiple get_order_details calls but failed to execute any of the three required actions (cancel order, modify address, modify items) despite having access to the correct tools. When tool calls failed, the agent immediately escalated to human support instead of troubleshooting or attempting to use the proper order ID format with # prefix. This represents a complete failure to accomplish the user's requests.
